category_title: Struggling readers who use physical movement and gestures to participate
minimal_context: Luis is participating in a whole-class shared reading activity involving a chanted list of words and a story discussion.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's read our list of words in the /an/ family together from the chart.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Runs his hand along the side of the table and taps his leg to the rhythm, reading slightly behind the voices of his peers. As the list finishes, he jumps to his feet and jogs in place.) Ran.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Okay, now let's talk about the story we just read.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Motions and taps his hands while waiting for the discussion.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What word in the story tells us how elephants sound when they walk?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Gets out of his seat and silently stomps his feet.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's read our list of words in the /an/ family together from the chart.

STUDENT: (Runs his hand along the side of the table and taps his leg to the rhythm, reading slightly behind the voices of his peers. As the list finishes, he jumps to his feet and jogs in place.) Ran.

TUTOR: Okay, now let's talk about the story we just read.

STUDENT: (Motions and taps his hands while waiting for the discussion.)

TUTOR: What word in the story tells us how elephants sound when they walk?

STUDENT: (Gets out of his seat and silently stomps his feet.)

task.content: Participating in phonics lessons, whole-class discussions about stories, and choral reading of a list of words in the /an/ family

context.materials: Poem chart, items from home for 'The Important Bag'
context.social_setting: Whole class with peers and teacher
context.time_context: The day begins with the shared reading of a poem-of-the-month

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When asked a direct comprehension question: 'What word in the story tells us how elephants sound when they walk?'
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Responded by getting out of his seat and silently stomping his feet instead of verbalizing the word
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Privileges his memory, illustrations, and his common sense over text

behavior_patterns.condition: As the class completes a chanted list of words in the /an/ family
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Runs hand along the side of the table, taps his leg to the rhythm, jumps to his feet, and shouts while jogging in place

behavior_patterns.condition: During phonics lessons and shared reading
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Participates by motioning, tapping, and 'reading' slightly behind the voices of his peers
